spec_match.rationale: Correctly models the one path that changed (payment + cross-origin + missing activation: SecurityError -> NotAllowedError) and leaves every other cell unchanged, matching the spec PR.

interactive.rationale: Three real selects drive a live decoder lane, and the migration matrix re-renders on every change.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature index has no blurb at all for this concept — the `<li>` only contains the title. Add the migration-matrix pitch.

edge_cases.rationale: Eight combinations of extension x frame x activation are enumerated; the safe-handler snippet covers the migration window.

references.rationale: Links the correct chromestatus feature 5160752715137024 and the spec PR.

design_system.rationale: All variables used and lane-tags pair background+color correctly. The `color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-amber) 70%, var(--bg-paper))` on `.error-tag.notallow` is unused in the rendered UI (the decoder lanes use `.row`, not `.error-tag`), so the class is dead code rather than a bug.

openQuestions.title: Write a feature-index blurb
openQuestions.detail:
The `
  • ` for error-decoder in the parent index.html has no `

    ` description, just a title. Add a one-line blurb describing the decoder + migration matrix so it has parity with the other three concepts.

openQuestions.title: Remove the dead `.error-tag` style block
openQuestions.detail: The page defines four `.error-tag.*` classes in the head <style> but never emits an element with class `error-tag` — the lanes render via `.row` and the matrix uses `.badge-tag`. Either delete the dead rules or rewrite the lane markup to use them so the design intent (rose/amber/emerald badges) actually surfaces.

openQuestions.title: Add a real `try` button per row
openQuestions.detail: The decoder shows what the browser SHOULD throw but never actually calls the API. Add an optional `run this combination` button per matrix row that mounts a sandboxed iframe (or top-frame call) and reports the real error name, matching the spc-error-probe lane.

summary: Excellent comprehensive matrix and decoder UI, only spoiled by an unused `.error-tag` style block and a missing blurb on the feature index. Adding live `run` buttons would round it out.
